Simple & Easy

How It Works

Getting your perfect bouquet is simple. Here's how we make the magic happen.

1
Browse & Choose
Pick a size and style from our menu, or request a fully custom creation.
2
Personalize It
Select your colors, add-ons, custom banner text, and any special touches.
3
Pay Securely
Check out with your credit or debit card, powered by Stripe — safe and fast.
4
Pickup or Delivery
Coordinate your pickup date in Houston, TX. Fresh blooms, ready for your moment.
